en: Albert, the forest is invading. I'm not quite understanding this. To celebrate
ko: Albert, 숲이 침입해 오고 있어요.

en: Christmas, we put a tree in the house. They do this in Germany, do they? Hmm, well
ko: 독일에서 이렇게 하는 거야?

en: that explains a lot. Perhaps you've confused the English for tree with the
ko: 혹시 영어로 나무라는 단어를 괘종시계랑 헷갈린 건 아니야?

en: English for grandfather clock. They're both made of wood. And how exactly does
ko: 둘 다 나무로 만들어졌으니까.

en: the tree relate to the baby Jesus? They did have trees in Bethlehem. Albert, I
ko: 베들레헴에도 나무는 있었지.

en: know you've had a tremendously hard year, a lot of projects you've worked very hard on
ko: 당신이 올해 정말 힘들었다는 거 알아, 열심히 한 프로젝트들이 많이

en: falling through, but has it really come to this? Yes, dear, you might think it
ko: 무산됐지만, 정말 이 지경까지 온 거야?

en: symbolises eternal life. I think it symbolises squirrels getting in the
ko: 내가 보기엔 다람쥐가 집에 들어오는 걸 상징하는 것 같은데.

en: house. Careful, children, I don't want you to get pine cholera. Well, I suppose it can
ko: 조심해, 얘들아, 솔잎 콜레라 걸리면 안 돼.

en: stay, but I'll need a footman to check the branches for urchins. Nobody gets in
ko: 뭐, 놔둘 수는 있겠지만, 하인이 가지 사이에 부랑아가 없는지 확인해야 해.

en: here for free. Let me get this straight. We put candles, lighted candles, in a tree
ko: 우리가 촛불을, 불 붙은 촛불을, 나무에 꽂고 그걸 집 안에 두는 거야.

en: in the house. Does anyone else see where I'm coming from here? Are you sure it's
ko: 내 말이 맞지 않아?

en: not a practical joke that Gladstone's playing on us? Because he does play a lot
ko: 혹시 이거 Gladstone이 우리한테 치는 장난 아니야?

en: of pranks and absolutely none of them are funny. And now we're sticking little
ko: 왜냐면 그 사람 장난을 많이 치는데 하나도 안 웃기거든.

en: ornaments on it. It gets safer and safer. I have to say, I always knew German
ko: 그리고 이제 거기에 작은 장식품을 달고 있네. 점점 안전해지는구나.

en: culture was crazy, Albert. I mean, have you met my mother? First pretzels and now
ko: 내 말은, 내 어머니 만나봤잖아?

en: this? All right, Albert, you can keep the tree, but next year I'm going to do
ko: 좋아, Albert, 나무는 놔둬도 돼. 하지만 내년에는 내가

en: something crazy for Christmas, like putting a horse in the dining room. And
ko: 뭔가 미친 짓을 할 거야 크리스마스에, 식당에 말을 들여놓는다든지.

en: there's a hundred of these outside we could look at. Oh, Albert, who didn't tell me it smelled so good?
ko: 이런 거 백 개는 있어서 구경할 수 있는데.

en: We need ten more!
ko: 열 개 더 필요해.
